data.title: Anchor Loans had a record $5.4 billion in loan originations in 2025, a 117% increase from the previous year, for US housing development.
data.description: A California-based company has finished expanding and integrating its platform to fund housing development and construction projects in the US. On January 14, 2026, Anchor Loans disclosed that they achieved a significant milestone with $5.4 billion in loan origination volume in 2025, showcasing a remarkable 117% increase compared to the previous year.

data.title: ATW Partners to invest $50 million in Frax's frxUSD stablecoin, custodied by BitGo. Joint initiative announced.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 14, 2026, ATW Partners, Frax, and BitGo Bank & Trust revealed a collaboration where ATW Partners, an investment firm from New York, along with its affiliates and portfolio companies, will invest a maximum of $50 million in a joint initiative.

data.title: JBDI Holdings faces delisting warning from Nasdaq due to failure to maintain minimum bid price of $1 for 30 days.
data.description: In Singapore, on January 14, 2026, JBDI Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: JBDI) announced that it received a written notification on January 7, 2026, from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC regarding its failure to maintain a minimum bid price of $1.00 for its ordinary shares over the last 30 consecutive business days. This is a requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Despite this notification, the Company's ordinary shares with the symbol "JBDI" will not be immediately delisted, and there will be no immediate impact on their listing or trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

data.title: MediCapture debuts aiScope™ Pilot for Veterinary Sciences at VMX 2026 to run Vision AI models in real-time. #MediCapture #aiScope #VMX2026
data.description: In Cherokee, Texas on January 14, 2026, MediCapture Inc. introduced aiScope™, a software designed to implement Vision AI models quickly and efficiently. The software is set to enable real-time training and practical use of medical artificial intelligence. MediCapture Inc. is a prominent provider of medical imaging systems worldwide.

data.title: Innovations Surgery Center is the first in Mid-Atlantic to offer robotic gynecologic surgery, aiming to improve outcomes and reduce costs.
data.description: Cutting-edge gynecologic surgeries performed by robots are now available at an outpatient surgery center in ROCKVILLE, Md. The innovative technique aims to enhance results, provide more surgeon availability, and lower healthcare expenses. This development, announced on Jan. 14, 2026, at the Innovations Surgery Center (ISC), brings a modern approach to medical care.

data.title: ICI will provide $1,000 matching contribution to employees for Trump Accounts, following federal program.
data.description: The President and CEO of the Investment Company Institute (ICI), Eric J. Pan, revealed plans for ICI to provide its employees with a $1,000 matching contribution towards the recently launched Trump Accounts. data.title: Former Marine AJ Pasciuti to release debut book "Darkhorse" with HarperCollins Leadership on May 19, 2026, exploring authentic leadership and sacrifice.
data.description: A former Marine Force Recon Scout Sniper, Amatangelo “AJ” Pasciuti, who is also the host of the Combat Story podcast, is set to release his first book titled "Darkhorse: Harnessing Hidden Potential in War and Life" with HarperCollins Leadership on May 19, 2026. The launch is strategically planned just before Memorial Day and in anticipation of the United States Semiquincentennial in July. In "Darkhorse," AJ presents a fresh war narrative focusing on authentic leadership, sacrifice, and resilience.

data.title: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield in Virginia renews contract with CHKD for comprehensive pediatric care, ensuring access and affordability.
data.description: In Norfolk, Virginia, Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield has renewed its managed care contract with Children’s Hospital of The King’s Daughters (CHKD), the sole full-service, standalone children's hospital in Virginia. The agreement, spanning multiple years, guarantees that Anthem members maintain continuous access to extensive pediatric services throughout the area. This solidifies a mutual dedication to affordability, coordinated healthcare, and sustained focus on enhancing the health and welfare of individuals.

data.title: Connected Car Security Market to grow with Managed Security Services and Vehicle SOCs. Global Forecast to 2032 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A new report on the Connected Car Security Market by ResearchAndMarkets.com forecasts market growth until 2032. The report explores security types, applications, electric vehicle types, solutions, forms, and regions. It features company profiles and strategies of key players in the market. Top players in the industry are dominating the market, offering innovative solutions.

data.title: Robert Half executives Paul F. Gentzkow recognized in Staffing Industry Analysts' 2026 North America Staffing 100 list.
data.description: In Menlo Park, California on January 14, 2026, two executives from Robert Half, a global talent solutions and business consulting firm listed on NYSE as RHI, have been recognized on the Staffing Industry Analysts' 2026 North America Staffing 100 list. Among them is Paul F. Gentzkow, serving as the president and CEO of Talent. This acknowledgment further highlights the impact and expertise of individuals within the staffing industry.
